meaning: n.法衣,袈裟,教士,教士职位
examples: He might need it, as well, so he slipped it into his cassock.
She was a nettle in which the rustle of the cassock was visible.
She helped him defeat the black monster and finally acquired the cassock.
An old priest stood on the steps of the school, a threadbare black coat over his cassock.
Halfway across the courtyard, he turned and, with his cassock blowing behind him, walked back toward me.
